name: Surge Copper Corp.
summary: Surge Copper Corp. engages in the acquisition, exploration, and development of mineral properties in Canada. It explores for copper, gold, silver, and molybdenum deposits. The company holds a 100% interest in the Ootsa property that comprises 124 mineral claims covering 72,710.4 hectares located in central British Columbia; and Berg Property located in British Columbia. It also owns 2% net smelter return royalty on the Auro and Auro South properties located in British Columbia. The company was formerly known as Gold Reach Resources Ltd. and changed its name to Surge Copper Corp. in February 2018. Surge Copper Corp. was incorporated in 1965 and is based in Vancouver, Canada.
